name: Encounter with the Wizard
description: An old wizard appears on the path before you.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: Ah, a traveler! I sense great potential in you. What brings you to these lands?

lines.speaker: player
lines.text: I'm searching for a way forward. Can you help?

choices.text: I seek knowledge about the ancient ruins.
I just need directions to the next town.

lines.speaker: npc
lines.text: The ruins you seek are dangerous. But I will grant you a blessing if you bring me proof of your courage.
